title: Puy-Saint-Vincent
summary: Puy-Saint-Vincent (French pronunciation: [pɥi sɛ̃ vɛ̃sɑ̃]; Occitan: Puei Sant Vincent) is a commune in the Hautes-Alpes department in southeastern France.
text:
Puy-Saint-Vincent (French pronunciation: [pɥi sɛ̃ vɛ̃sɑ̃]; Occitan: Puei Sant Vincent) is a commune in the Hautes-Alpes department in southeastern France.
